get.description: Returns a single STP rule by its identifier, regardless of enabled status.

put.description: Updates all fields of an existing STP rule and reloads the in-memory rule cache.

delete.description: Sets the rule's enabled flag to false and reloads the in-memory rule cache. The rule record is retained in the database.

put.description: Persists a new order_index for each rule_id in the supplied list, starting at 1. Reloads the in-memory rule cache.

404.description: One of the rule IDs does not exist

get.description: Returns a single market index definition by its canonical name.

put.description: Updates an existing market index. The index name is taken from the path variable.

delete.description: Sets the index status to ARCHIVED. The record is retained in the database.

get.description: Returns a single credit line by its UUID identifier.

put.description: Replaces all mutable fields of an existing credit line.

get.summary: Get an asset class extension by code

get.description: Returns all holidays for the given financial centre code. Optional 'year' parameter restricts to a single year.

put.description: Updates the calendar name and whether it is the system EOD calendar.

delete.description: Removes the calendar metadata row and every holiday for the given code. Returns 404 if no calendar exists for the code.

get.summary: Get a bank account by ID

put.summary: Update a bank account's mutable fields
put.description: Updates accountNumber, accountName, correspondentBank, swiftBic, and isPrimary. Returns 400 if legalEntityId, currency, or accountType differ from the stored values.

400.description: Validation failure or immutable field change

delete.description: Sets is_active = false. FK references to cash_balances and ssis are preserved.

put.summary: Add or keep a DATA-group membership
Grant a scope to a FUNCTIONAL group
put.description: Adds the scope to the group's auth.group_scopes bundle. The scope must be a member of the system scope catalog (400 if unknown). Every current member's cached scope resolution is invalidated immediately.

post.description: Computes MTM, P&L, and optionally component breakdown
Reloads schemas, roles, STP rules, and approval chain configs

post.summary: Rebuild all projections from event store
post.description: Replays all events and rebuilds projections. Returns 202 Accepted.

get.description: Returns all currently enabled STP threshold rules ordered by rule ID.

post.description: Persists a new STP threshold rule and reloads the in-memory rule cache.

get.description: Returns all simulation definitions regardless of status.

post.description: Creates a new portfolio simulation definition in PENDING status.
Executes the simulation synchronously and returns a run summary.
Triggers an intraday run immediately with current market data.

Sets the cancellation flag for the simulation. The engine checks this flag between pages and stops gracefully.

Worst-case cancel latency = one page processing time + one statement timeout (C3). Already-persisted partial results are retained and the run is resumable.

Returns HTTP 409 if the simulation is already in a terminal state (completed, failed, or cancelled).

200.description: Cancellation flag set; returns current progress

post.description: Transitions the settlement to SETTLED status and projects the cash balance movement.

get.description: Returns limits for a specific book when bookId is supplied, or all limits across every book when omitted.

parameters.name: bookId
parameters.description: Book UUID — omit to return limits across all books

post.description: Creates an active per-book risk limit. The metric must be one of dv01, duration, vega, notional, market_value.

409.description: An active limit already exists for this book/metric/currency

post.description: Truncates and rebuilds the matched_book_position projection from the current deals table.

get.description: Returns EOD quotes for the given date, optionally filtered by currency and instrument type. Defaults to today when date is omitted.

post.description: Persists one or more market quotes. Upserts on (quote_key, as_of_date, snapshot_time).

Prices the supplied instrument using the DCF model and returns clean price,
dirty price, accrued interest, yield analytics (YTM, YTW, YTC, YTP), spread
analytics (z-spread, ASW, G-spread, I-spread, OAS — availability depends on
market data), duration (modified, Macaulay, effective), convexity, DV01, and
the projected cashflow schedule.

This endpoint is synchronous and non-persisting — no events are appended and
no projections are updated.

Currently supports instrument type: bond. IRS / FX / option support is planned
for a future release.

422.description: Instrument payload fails JSON Schema validation or instrument type is unsupported

424.description: Required market data curve or snapshot is unavailable for the requested date

post.description:
Composes existing engines synchronously to answer a single question:
what does this draft trade do to my limits, my counterparty, and my book?

Returns:
  - limits: counterparty_exposure, issuer_concentration, sector_limit,
    country_limit, single_name_cap. Exactly one row carries binding=true
    (the highest post-trade utilization).
  - credit: counterparty agency ratings (graceful-null when unavailable),
    CDS placeholder, CVA estimate, exposure before / after.
  - portfolio_impact: DV01 / modified duration / convexity (before / after / delta),
    key-rate DV01 delta vector, parallel + curve + spread scenario P&L
    (10 shifts), and the draft's VaR contribution.
  - relative_value: placeholder structure with all-null fields until B3/B4 ship.
  - cash_impact: settlement-leg cash amount, sign by side.
  - scope_truncated: true when more than ~5000 positions exist in the
    requested scope; the request still returns with partial aggregates.

Non-persisting: no events, no projections, no audit rows.

422.description: Instrument payload fails JSON Schema validation, or scope is invalid

424.description: Required market data curve or snapshot is unavailable for the requested date

get.description: Returns the metadata (alias, algorithm, registered_at) for every key currently registered for the authenticated tenant.

post.summary: Register a public key for JAR signing
post.description: Registers a Base64-encoded X.509 DER public key for the authenticated tenant

post.summary: Reject payment message from the network
Pend cancellation — bank routed on (PMPG PDCR / PTNA)
Generate a payment message for a settlement

get.description: Returns all parties. Use ?expand=true to populate child hierarchies.

post.description: Creates a new party in the hierarchy.
Groups settlements by counterparty, currency, and date
Creates a reversal entry that mirrors the original with debits and credits swapped. The original entry is marked REVERSED.
Creates a settlement entry (CASH debit / SETTLEMENT_PAYABLE credit) for the specified deal. The entry starts in DRAFT status.
Closes the specified YYYY-MM period. Fails if the period is already closed or if any DRAFT entries remain.

409.description: Period close conflict — already closed or pending draft items remain

get.description: Returns all instruments. Supports type filtering and identifier typeahead lookup via q/identifier_kind/limit.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Optional instrument type filter (e.g., bond, fx_pair)

parameters.name: identifier_kind
parameters.description: Optional identifier kind filter (e.g., isin, ticker)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Optional result cap for identifier lookup. Defaults to 20 and is capped at 50.

post.description: Creates a PERPETUAL or SHARABLE instrument. Presence of maturityDate determines the group. The details map is validated against the instrument type's JSON Schema.

400.description: Validation error — details schema violation or invalid currency

post.description: Deactivates the original and creates a corrected successor with a fresh UUID. Blocked (409) when a confirmed/settling/settled/accounted deal references the instrument.

409.description: Instrument INACTIVE, or a live deal references it

get.description: Returns all lifecycle events (coupon, call, maturity, corporate action) for a SHARABLE instrument, ordered chronologically by event date.

200.description: List of lifecycle events (may be empty)

post.description: Records a coupon, call, maturity, corporate action, or custom event on a SHARABLE instrument. Returns 400 if the instrument is PERPETUAL.

400.description: Instrument is PERPETUAL or event type is blank

post.description: Creates a new instruction in PENDING status assigned to a book or specific trader.
Links an item to a deal and marks it EXECUTED. Updates parent instruction status.
Claims a PENDING item for the authenticated trader. Returns 409 if already claimed.
Claims a PENDING instruction for the authenticated trader. Returns 409 if already claimed.

get.description: Returns all market index definitions, including ACTIVE, TEMPLATE, and ARCHIVED.

post.description: Persists a new market index definition. Optionally includes grid point definitions inline.

get.summary: List grid points for an index
get.description: Returns all grid point definitions for the named market index.

post.summary: Save grid points for an index
post.description: Replaces the grid point definitions for the named market index.

get.summary: Get grid point data for a date
get.description: Returns all grid point data observations for the named market index on the given as-of date.

post.description: Persists time-series data observations for the grid points of the named market index.

get.description: Returns captured fixings. Filter by indexName and optionally by fixingDate or date range (fromDate/toDate).

parameters.name: indexName
parameters.description: Optional index name filter (e.g., SOFR, CDOR, EURIBOR)

parameters.name: fixingDate
parameters.description: Optional fixing date filter in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2025-03-14)

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Optional range start date (inclusive) in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: Optional range end date (inclusive) in ISO 8601 format

post.description: Records a published fixing for a reference rate index (e.g., SOFR, CDOR) on a given date.

post.summary: Run a single EOD step synchronously
Catch the business date up to a target date

get.description: Returns a filtered, paginated list of deals. All filters are optional.

post.description: Creates a new deal in Draft status after multi-layer validation.
Transitions a confirmed deal to TERMINATED status.

422.description: Transition not permitted from current status

post.summary: Substitute collateral on a repo deal
post.description: Replaces the pledged collateral instrument. Rejected with 409 if the counterparty has an open margin call.

400.description: Deal is not a REPO, or new instrument is not SHARABLE, or insufficient available quantity

409.description: Counterparty has an open margin call — resolve before substituting

post.description: Instructs close of an open (is_open=true) repo; schedules far-leg settlement for T+1.

400.description: Deal is not an open repo

post.description: Transitions a deal to CANCELLED status.

422.description: Transition not permitted from current status

post.description: Validates a prospective deal against credit limit, currency exposure, and custom Python rules. Returns HTTP 200 if all checks pass, HTTP 422 if any check fails. The deal is NOT created.

422.description: One or more pre-trade checks failed

get.description: Returns the currently active recipe for the named index.

post.description: Replaces the active recipe for the named index. The previous active recipe is deactivated.
Runs the OIS bootstrap synchronously. Returns the CalibrationRun record.

get.description: Returns all credit lines currently in ACTIVE status.

post.description: Persists a new credit line for the specified counterparty.
Transitions the credit line to SUSPENDED status.
Clears the SchemaRegistry cache and reloads all schemas from disk.

FUNCTIONAL group scopes are DB-backed (DS T12, #712); this endpoint invalidates every cached ScopeResolver entry so the next request for any user re-resolves from auth.group_scopes immediately, ahead of the cache TTL.

get.summary: List all registered asset class extensions

post.summary: Register a new asset class extension
post.description: Persists and registers a client-defined asset class.

400.description: Invalid request body or code collision with native asset class

post.description: Triggers a closeout execution run against all confirmed deals for the given business date. Body is optional — omitting closeoutDate defaults to today.
Applies a manual fixing rate to a PROJECTED FLOAT_COUPON cashflow, recalculating the coupon amount using the deal's notional and the cashflow's day count fraction.

400.description: Validation error — missing rate or invalid cashflow state

409.description: Cashflow is not in PROJECTED status or not a FLOAT_COUPON

post.description: Bulk upload holidays for a calendar code. Replaces existing entries for the same dates.
Returns whether a given date is a business day across the specified calendars.
Rolls a date to the nearest business day per the given convention.

get.description: Returns all trading and banking books ordered by name.

post.description: Creates a new trading or banking book.

get.summary: List bank accounts for a legal entity
get.description: Returns all bank accounts for the specified legal entity party UUID.

post.description: Creates a new nostro or vostro bank account for a legal entity.

post.summary: Verify hash chain integrity for an aggregate

get.description: Returns all artifacts for the caller's tenant, ordered by creation time descending.

post.description: Creates a new artifact in DRAFT state. Version is auto-assigned.
Transitions a DRAFT artifact to UNDER_REVIEW.
Retires an artifact permanently. Retired artifacts remain readable for audit.
Rejects an artifact under review. A reason is required.
Deactivates the active artifact. The artifact is no longer served.
Approves an artifact under review. Reviewer must differ from the uploader.
Activates an approved artifact. Any previously active version is deactivated.
Records a rejection. Cancels all remaining PENDING and BLOCKED steps in the chain. Comment is required.

403.description: Insufficient scope — requires approvals:reject or step requiredScope

post.description: Manually sets the request status to ESCALATED. Automated escalation runs via the batch job.
Records an approval decision. Unblocks the next step in the chain if one exists.

403.description: Insufficient scope — requires approvals:approve or step requiredScope

get.description: Lists the current user's AI sessions.

post.description: Creates a new typed AI chat session for the authenticated user.
Sends a natural language message to the user's AI agent and returns the response.

post.summary: Add a counterparty or instrument to a restricted (MNPI) list
post.description: Creates a DENY entitlement grant for the COUNTERPARTY or INSTRUMENT dimension. The resource is blocked across all books for the grant's principal (typically a firm-wide or desk GROUP). To grant a wall-crossing exception for a single user, create a USER-principal ALLOW grant for the same resource via POST /api/v1/admin/entitlements with effect=ALLOW, reason, and valid_until.

post.summary: Declare a separation-of-duties (SoD) conflict between two groups
post.description: Rejects with 409 (group_conflict_violators) and the violator list if any user currently belongs to both groups, unless force=true. With force=true the conflict is recorded anyway and the violator list is returned as a report; existing memberships are not removed.

201.description: Conflict declared (no pre-existing violators, or force=true)

409.description: Pre-existing violators found and force was not set

post.summary: Create an entitlement grant (ALLOW or DENY)

get.description: Returns a single instrument by UUID.

delete.description: Marks an instrument as INACTIVE (logical delete). The instrument remains queryable for historical data.

patch.description: Updates name, identifiers, and/or extensions in place. Rejects any attempt to change financial terms (details) with 400 — use supersede for that.

400.description: details field present, or no amendable field supplied

409.description: Instrument is INACTIVE, or duplicate identifier

get.description: Retrieves a deal and the transitions available to the current caller.

patch.description: Updates a deal's details and/or extensions. Requires version for optimistic concurrency.
Moves a deal to the requested target status if the transition is permitted.

422.description: Transition not defined in state machine

patch.description: Renames or archives an AI session.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of valuations with optional filters. Results are ordered valuation_date DESC, calculated_at DESC. Limit is clamped to 200.
Returns the system as-of business date. Frontends should call this on app load and on focus to stay in sync across EOD rollovers.
Returns a single simulation definition by its UUID.

delete.description: Removes the simulation definition by its UUID.

get.description: Returns the current lifecycle status of the simulation.
Returns computed results for the simulation with optional filtering by deal, result type, currency, or book.

parameters.name: resultType
parameters.description: Filter by result type (e.g., mtm, delta)

get.description: Filter by dealId, status, or counterpartyId
Returns all matched-book positions grouped by counterparty.
Returns a single named reference-data catalog with ETag and conditional GET support.
Returns the catalogs visible to the authenticated user together with ETags and required scopes.

Returns per-position sensitivities (DV01, duration, convexity, delta, gamma, vega),
per-currency concentration weights, and a top-N concentration summary.
Sensitivities are sourced from domain.valuations.metrics (latest per deal for as_of_date).
Null sensitivity fields indicate the metric does not apply to the position's asset class.
Limit fields carry the binding per-book risk limit (issue #715) for the line's book and
currency — the active limit with the highest utilization — or are null when none is configured.
When bookId is omitted, risk lines and concentration are aggregated across all books the
caller has read access to; limit utilization is still assessed per book.
Configure limits via /api/v1/risk-limits.

parameters.name: bookId
parameters.description: Filter by book UUID; omit to aggregate across all entitled books

parameters.name: as_of_date
parameters.description: As-of business date (YYYY-MM-DD); defaults to current business date

get.description: Filter by bookId, currency, or assetClass

parameters.name: as_of_date
parameters.description: Filter by business date in YYYY-MM-DD format

get.description: Returns a party and optionally its child hierarchy.
Returns active external parties eligible for deal counterparty selection. Excludes type=group container nodes, which are organisational parents and cannot be used as booking counterparties.
Returns the authenticated user's effective current book set with highest access wins.
Returns journal entries filtered by dealId, entryType, or period. If dealId is provided, entries for that deal are returned; if period is provided, entries for that accounting period are returned.

parameters.name: entryType
parameters.description: Filter by entry type (e.g., mtm, settlement, reversal)

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Filter by accounting period in YYYY-MM format

get.summary: Get a journal entry by ID
get.description: Returns the journal entry with all its lines.
Returns all registered posting rules in most-specific-first order.
Returns persisted z-spread and g-spread snapshots plus server-side z-score statistics.

400.description: Invalid window or unsupported instrument type

get.description: Returns same-issuer peers first, then sector/rating/tenor peers for relative-value analysis.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Optional maximum number of peers to return. Defaults to 20 and is capped at 50.

400.description: Invalid limit or unsupported instrument type

get.description: Returns schema-backed instrument types with display labels, lifecycle group, and identifier kinds.
Returns the instruction and all associated items in sequence order.

Interpolates the index curve at the requested tenor (in years) for the given as-of date. The returned value's meaning depends on the index type — discount factor for DISCOUNT/OIS, forward rate for PROJECTION, etc.

404.description: Index not found or no data for date

get.summary: Range of discount factors at day offsets
get.description: Returns a table of interpolated discount factors at evenly-spaced day offsets from the as-of date. Tenor input is in days; the response includes both the day offset and the resolved tenor date (asOfDate + tenorDays). Valid only for DISCOUNT or OIS indexes.

400.description: Invalid range or index type does not support discount factors

404.description: Index not found or no data for date

get.description: Returns the interpolated discount factor for the named index at the requested tenor. Only valid for indexes whose type is DISCOUNT or OIS — for those, the stored grid values are discount factors and are returned directly.

400.description: Index type does not support discount factors

404.description: Index not found or no data for date

get.summary: Get current EOD step status for a business date
Get EOD run attempts for a business date
get.description: Returns run history for the given date. Defaults to today when as_of_date is omitted.
Returns all events for a deal in version order.

get.summary: Get coupon schedule for a bond deal
get.description: Returns the full coupon payment schedule derived from the deal's cashflows. Supports an optional asOf parameter for what-if date projection.

parameters.name: asOf
parameters.description: Optional as-of date for schedule projection

get.description: Returns calibration run history for the named index, most recent first.
Returns all credit lines granted to the specified counterparty, regardless of status.
Returns current and potential future exposure for the specified counterparty.
Returns all enabled STP threshold rules currently loaded.
Returns all JSON Schemas currently loaded in the SchemaRegistry.

get.summary: Check schema availability for a product type and asset class
get.description: Returns all schemas registered under deals/{productType}/{assetClass}.

parameters.name: productType
parameters.description: Product type, e.g. swap, forward, option

parameters.name: assetClass
parameters.description: Asset class, e.g. rates, fx, credit

get.summary: Get raw JSON Schema document by product type / asset class / subtype
get.description: Returns the verbatim JSON Schema document for the requested triple. The schema version is available in the X-Schema-Version and ETag response headers.

parameters.name: productType
parameters.description: Product type, e.g. swap, forward, option, instruments

parameters.name: assetClass
parameters.description: Asset class, e.g. rates, fx, credit

get.summary: List available roles and their scopes
get.description: Returns every FUNCTIONAL group (former role) from auth.groups together with the scope identifiers (auth.group_scopes) each grants (DS T12, #712). Manage these via POST/DELETE /api/v1/admin/functional-groups/{id}/scopes.
Returns all approval chains loaded from chains.json.
Returns all compliance check verdicts produced by the EOD compliance step for the given business date, ordered breach-first.
Returns closeout batch records for the given business date (defaults to today).

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Business date in YYYY-MM-DD format; defaults to today

get.summary: Get a closeout batch by ID
get.description: Returns the detail for a specific closeout batch.
Returns the cashflow schedule for a deal, including each cashflow's id, type, status, payment date, and amount. The id is required to fix a PROJECTED FLOAT_COUPON via POST /api/v1/cashflows/{id}/fix.

404.description: Deal not found or not visible to the caller

get.description: Returns a forward-looking cash balance series for a given currency and date window.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Optional: filter by counterparty/nostro account UUID

parameters.name: dealId
parameters.description: Optional: restrict projection to a single deal ID

get.description: Returns cash balances filtered by currency, account ID, and/or value date.

parameters.name: as_of_date
parameters.description: Filter by value date in ISO-8601 format (optional, defaults to today)

get.summary: Get cash balance by account and currency
get.description: Returns the cash balance for a specific account and currency on the given date.

parameters.name: as_of_date
parameters.description: Value date in ISO-8601 format (optional, defaults to today)

get.description: Returns summary of all stored financial centre calendars
Returns the chain: valuation → deal → curve → fixings

get.summary: Get event history for an aggregate
List all versions of a named artifact

get.description: Returns approval requests filtered by optional entity_type, entity_id, and status. When no filters are supplied, only PENDING approvals are returned.

parameters.name: entity_type
parameters.description: Optional entity type filter, for example deal

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: Optional entity UUID filter. Must be supplied together with entity_type

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional approval status filter, for example PENDING

get.summary: Get an approval request by ID
get.description: Returns the full approval request record including current status and decision details.
Returns paginated message history for a session.

Per user: FUNCTIONAL/DATA group memberships, effective entitlements (including DS T10 wall-crossing USER grants), expiring/expired grants, and SoD violations (DS T11). Returns JSON by default; pass format=csv or Accept: text/csv for a CSV export (one row per user, multi-valued fields flattened to semicolon-separated summaries).

get.summary: List FUNCTIONAL groups and the scopes they grant
get.description: FUNCTIONAL groups replace schemas/roles/roles.json (DS T12, #712); each group's name corresponds to a former role and its scope bundle (auth.group_scopes) is the set of scopes granted to every member.

get.summary: Get a FUNCTIONAL group and its scope bundle

delete.description: Removes a single holiday row from the calendar. Date must be ISO-8601 (yyyy-MM-dd).

404.description: Holiday not found for this calendar

delete.summary: Remove a declared SoD group conflict
Revoke a scope from a FUNCTIONAL group
delete.description: Removes the scope from the group's auth.group_scopes bundle. Every current member's cached scope resolution is invalidated immediately.

404.description: Functional group not found, or group does not grant this scope

AddFunctionalGroupScopeRequestDto.description: Grant a scope to a FUNCTIONAL group

scope.description: Scope identifier (must be a known system scope)

FunctionalGroupDto.description: A FUNCTIONAL group (former role) and the scopes it grants

ValuateRequestDto.description: Request to valuate a deal as of a specific date

dealId.description: UUID of the deal to value

marketData.description: Product-specific market data (rates, discount factors, vol surfaces, etc.)

detailed.description: If true, response includes per-component valuation breakdown

version.description: Monotonic version number for this artifact name

contentHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the artifact bytes

ValuationResponseDto.description: Valuation result for a single deal on a given date

cleanValue.description: Clean value (market value excluding accrued interest)

accruedInterest.description: Accrued interest since last coupon date

realizedPnl.description: Realized P&L from closeout or settlement

dayPnl.description: Day P&L: today's MTM minus yesterday's MTM

calculatedAt.description: Timestamp when this valuation was computed

carryPnl.description: Carry P&L: accrued interest movement day-over-day

fxPnl.description: FX P&L: MTM change attributable to FX rate movement

fxRate.description: FX rate snapshot used for this valuation; null for base currency deals

producedBy.description: Provenance of an external plugin result; null for built-in valuators

metric.description: Governed metric: dv01, duration, vega, notional, market_value

RiskLimitResponseDto.description: A per-book risk limit governing one metric in one currency

metric.description: Governed metric: dv01, duration, vega, notional, market_value

asOf.description: The date for which the market data snapshot was taken

snapshotId.description: Optional EOD snapshot UUID for precise snapshot selection

instrument.description: Instrument definition. Must include a 'type' field (e.g. 'bond'). The payload is validated against the corresponding instrument JSON Schema.

marketDataRef.description: Optional market-data snapshot reference. When absent, the service resolves the most recent closing snapshot for the valuation date.

valuationDate.description: As-of date for the pricing calculation (ISO-8601 date)

discountFactor.description: Discount factor applied to this cashflow

daysToPayment.description: Calendar days from valuation date to this payment

dcf.description: Day-count fraction for this coupon period

PretradePriceResponseDto.description: Pre-trade price and risk analytics result

price.description: Clean, dirty, and accrued interest prices

yield.description: Yield analytics (YTM, YTW, YTC, YTP) — null when the bond is matured

spread.description: Spread analytics in basis points — absent when benchmark curves are unavailable

risk.description: Risk / duration analytics — null when the bond is matured

cashflowSchedule.description: Remaining coupon and principal cashflow schedule

clean.description: Clean price (full price minus accrued interest)

dirty.description: Dirty price (full price including accrued interest)

accrued.description: Accrued interest since last coupon date

dv01.description: DV01 — dollar value of one basis point shift

cs01.description: CS01 — credit sensitivity to 1bp spread widening

gSpreadBps.description: G-spread vs. government benchmark in basis points

iSpreadBps.description: I-spread vs. swap curve in basis points

oasBps.description: Option-adjusted spread in basis points (callable/puttable bonds only)

ytc.description: Yield to call — nearest call date only

ytp.description: Yield to put — nearest put date only

instrument.description: Instrument payload (must include 'type'; same shape as POST /pretrade/price)

counterpartyId.description: Counterparty UUID — drives credit limits and CVA. Optional but recommended.

book.description: Book / portfolio UUID — drives the scope of portfolio aggregates

strategy.description: Strategy label — informational; used when scope=strategy

notional.description: Draft notional — sign is encoded by 'side'

price.description: Draft trade price; optional — defaults to mid from curve

instrumentId.description: UUID of the persisted instrument (when the draft refers to an already-registered bond). When provided, the response populates relative_value — z-score (3m), spread vs issuer-curve peers, and rich/cheap classification — from the spread history and comparables services. Omit for purely synthetic draft instruments where no history exists.

PretradeWhatIfRequestDto.description: Pre-trade what-if request — limits, credit, portfolio impact, RV, cash impact

draftDeal.description: Envelope describing the prospective trade — no persistence

marketDataRef.description: Optional market-data snapshot reference; when absent the most recent EOD snapshot is used

valuationDate.description: Snake-case constant identifier of the endpoint contract

limits.description: Limit rows — exactly one carries binding=true (highest post-trade utilization)

credit.description: Credit snapshot — rating, CVA, before/after exposure

portfolioImpact.description: Portfolio impact — sensitivities + scenario P&L + VaR contribution

relativeValue.description: Relative-value placeholder (B3/B4 outputs — all-null until shipped)

scopeTruncated.description: True when the requested scope had more positions than the synchronous limit; the computation used the first N positions only (latency safety valve)

RelativeValueDto.description: Relative-value snapshot — populated when instrument_id is provided. rich_or_cheap signal: 'rich' when z_score_3m > +0.5, 'cheap' when z_score_3m < -0.5, 'fair' when -0.5 <= z_score_3m <= +0.5 (null when z-score unavailable).

buy_sell.description: Deal direction. Required for directional products (bonds, FX options, FRA). Must be "BUY" or "SELL" (uppercase). Responses return lowercase ("buy"/"sell") to match the DB convention.

fixingRate.description: All-in fixing rate. Null indicates pending fixings for FRN coupons.

observationStart.description: Observation window start (FRN float_coupon, null when fixings pending)

observationEnd.description: Observation window end (FRN float_coupon, null when fixings pending)

compoundedRate.description: Compounded overnight rate pre-spread (FRN float_coupon, null when fixings pending)

spread.description: Per-period spread applied to the compounded rate (FRN float_coupon only)

CreateRestrictedListEntryRequestDto.description: Create a restricted-list (DENY) entry for a counterparty or instrument

principalId.description: Registry user UUID or DATA group UUID

resourceId.description: Counterparty (domain.parties) or instrument (domain.instruments) UUID to restrict

validUntil.description: Validity end timestamp; required for USER-principal entries

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the restriction; required for USER-principal entries

DataGroupDetailDto.description: Detailed DATA group view including members and grants

DataGroupMemberDto.description: Membership entry within a DATA group

CreateGroupConflictRequestDto.description: Declare a separation-of-duties (SoD) conflict between two groups

reason.description: Justification for the conflict (e.g. information barrier)

ConflictDeclarationResultDto.description: Result of declaring a SoD conflict: the conflict plus any pre-existing violators

GroupConflictDto.description: Declared separation-of-duties (SoD) conflict between two DATA/FUNCTIONAL groups

principalId.description: Registry user UUID or DATA group UUID

resourceId.description: Referenced book/legal-entity/counterparty/instrument UUID; null when wildcard=true

wildcard.description: True to grant against the full current dimension set

effect.description: ALLOW (additive, Phase 1 default) or DENY (subtractive restricted-list entry, DS T10)

validUntil.description: Validity end timestamp; required for USER grants

reason.description: Human-readable reason; required for USER grants

ValuationSummaryDto.description: Lightweight valuation summary for list/search results

valuationType.description: Valuation type: eod, intraday, or manual

calculatedAt.description: Timestamp when this valuation was computed

ValuationDetailResponseDto.description: Per-component breakdown entry for a deal valuation

componentType.description: Component type, e.g. cashflow, leg, coupon

presentValue.description: Discounted present value of this component

ConcentrationSummary.description: Concentration callout for a single currency

top_n.description: Number of positions included in top-N

top_n_weight_pct.description: Combined weight_pct of the top-N positions in this currency

lineCount.description: Total number of positions in this currency

PortfolioRiskResponseDto.description: Portfolio risk surface: per-position sensitivities and concentration summary

asOfDate.description: Business date for which risk is computed

PositionRiskLineDto.description: Risk analytics for a single position (book × instrument)

instrumentId.description: Instrument UUID; null for unique products (IRS, FRA, Swap)

productType.description: Product type, e.g. swap, spot, bond

assetClass.description: Asset class, e.g. rates, fx, credit

dv01.description: P&L change per 1bp parallel rate shift (USD per bp); null when not applicable

duration.description: Modified duration in years; null when not applicable

delta.description: Portfolio delta (aggregate across deals); null when not applicable

gamma.description: Portfolio gamma; null when not applicable

vega.description: Portfolio vega (P&L per 1% vol move); null when not applicable

weightPct.description: This position's percentage of portfolio market value on a per-currency basis

limitId.description: Governing limit UUID; null when no active limit covers this book/currency

limitMetric.description: Metric governed by the limit: dv01, duration, vega, notional, market_value; null — see limitId

limitAmount.description: Configured limit amount; null — see limitId

limitUtilizationPct.description: Book/currency utilisation as a percentage of limitAmount; null — see limitId

limitBreached.description: Whether the book/currency aggregate has breached the limit; null — see limitId

PositionResponseDto.description: Aggregated position for a book/instrument combination

instrumentId.description: Instrument UUID; null for unique products (IRS, FRA, Swap)

productType.description: Product type, e.g. swap, spot, bond

assetClass.description: Asset class, e.g. rates, fx, credit

notionalAggregate.description: Aggregate notional across all deals in this position

marketValue.description: Aggregate market value across all deals in this position

cleanValue.description: Aggregate clean value across all deals in this position

accruedInterest.description: Aggregate accrued interest across all deals in this position

bookValue.description: Aggregate carrying value across all deals in this position

unrealizedPnl.description: Aggregate unrealized P&L across all deals in this position

realizedPnl.description: Aggregate realized P&L across all deals in this position

dayPnl.description: Aggregate day P&L across all deals in this position

dealCount.description: Number of deals contributing to this position

lastUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last position update

bookCode.description: Short portfolio code used by pickers and dashboards

PortfolioEntitlementsResponseDto.description: Effective resolved portfolio entitlements for the authenticated user

books.description: Resolved current books with highest effective access

restrictedCounterparties.description: Counterparties on a restricted (MNPI) list with no wall-crossing exception currently in effect for this user (DS T10)

restrictedInstruments.description: Instruments on a restricted (MNPI) list with no wall-crossing exception currently in effect for this user (DS T10)

RestrictedResourceDto.description: A restricted-list (MNPI) resource currently blocked for the authenticated user

InstrumentSpreadHistoryResponseDto.description: Time series of daily bond spreads and z-score statistics

InstrumentComparablesResponseDto.description: Comparable bond peer-set for relative-value analysis

DataGroupSummaryDto.description: Summary view of a DATA entitlement group

bearerAuth.description: JWT bearer token obtained from the TRMS identity provider
